Layout.title: SummaryVox | Book Summaries
Layout.description: Listen to and download the best book summaries in audio and PDF.

footer.description: Your platform to listen, download, and enjoy the best book summaries.

hero.subtitle: Listen to, download, and share book summaries in both audio and PDF formats. Carefully curated content for you.

features.title: Main Features
features.f1Desc: Enjoy our summaries in your preferred format. Listen anywhere or read quietly.
features.f2Desc: Expert curation of the best books on business, personal development, and more. Straight to what matters.
features.f3Desc: Take the summaries everywhere. You can download the PDFs or audio to consume them offline whenever you decide.

engagement.title: How many books have you bought and never finished?
engagement.description: We know time is your most valuable resource. Don't let a lack of hours keep you from absorbing the knowledge of world leaders. With SummaryVox, you get the key ideas in under 20 minutes.

premium.title: Premium
features: Offline downloads for the entire catalog

cta.title: Ready to feed your mind?
cta.description: Join thousands of users who are already listening to the best summaries with SummaryVox.

Cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
Cancel.desc1: We're sorry to see you go. Cancelling is as easy as subscribing: you do it here, in two clicks, no phone calls, no retention questions, no extra charges.
Cancel.li1: 24h Trial: If you're within your first 24 hours, the cancellation is completely free of charge and no payment is processed.
Cancel.li2: Future Charges: By confirming, you immediately stop all future automatic billing. You keep Premium access until the end of the period you already paid for.
Cancel.li3: 14-day refund: If less than 14 days have passed since your first paid charge, you can request a prorated refund by writing to info@summaryvox.com.
Cancel.desc2: To proceed with the cancellation, enter the email address associated with your account. You don't need to log in.
Cancel.cancelSuccessDesc: Your subscription has been successfully cancelled. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. We've also sent you a confirmation email.
Cancel.notFound: We couldn't find any active subscription for that email. Check that it's the same email you used to sign up, or whether you signed up with Google.
Cancel.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again or write to info@summaryvox.com.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Log in or create your account
Login.successMagic: Check your email! We've sent you a magic link.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: SummaryVox ("SummaryVox", "we", "us", or the "Platform") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Policy describes what personal data we collect, how we use it, the legal bases on which we process it, retention periods, and your rights. We process personal data in compliance with applicable data protection laws, including the EU General Data Protection Regulation ("GDPR") where applicable.
Privacy.s1Text: We collect only the data needed to provide the service and comply with legal obligations:
Privacy.s1Li1: Registration and account information: name, email address, password (stored as a hash) and the provider identifier when you sign in with Google.
Privacy.s1Li2: Payment information: your card data is processed and stored by Stripe (a PCI-DSS certified processor); SummaryVox does not keep your full card number or CVV on its servers. We only retain Stripe's customer_id and subscription_id while the subscription is active.
Privacy.s1Li3: Usage data: IP address, device and browser type, pages visited, summaries listened to or downloaded, and playback preferences.
Privacy.s1Li4: Support communications: messages you send us to info@summaryvox.com and our replies.
Privacy.s2Text: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
Privacy.s2Li1: Provide, maintain and improve the service (account management, library, playback and download of summaries).
Privacy.s2Li2: Send transactional and operational communications related to your subscription, account and security (welcome, 24-hour trial reminders, payment receipts, price change notices, cancellation confirmations).
Privacy.s2Li3: Process your payments and prevent fraud through Stripe.
Privacy.s2Li4: Aggregated, anonymous analytics to understand how the service is used and improve it.
Privacy.s2Li5: Comply with legal, tax, accounting obligations and responses to competent authorities.
Privacy.s3Text: Where GDPR applies, we process your personal data only when one of the following legal bases is met:
Privacy.s3Li1: Performance of the contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): processing necessary to provide the service you signed up for, including account management, subscription management and delivery of summaries.
Privacy.s3Li2: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR): retention of invoices and accounting records, response to tax or judicial authority requests and compliance with applicable regulations.
Privacy.s3Li3: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR): secure and efficient operation of the service, including security logs, fraud and abuse prevention, and anonymous analytics to improve the product. You may object to processing based on legitimate interest at any time by writing to info@summaryvox.com.
Privacy.s3Li4: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR): only if in the future we send you marketing communications or use non-essential cookies, we'll ask for explicit, granular and revocable consent. We do not rely on this legal basis today.
Privacy.s4Text: To provide the service we rely on the following providers acting as data processors under contract:
Privacy.s4Li1: Stripe (payment processing and recurring billing). We do not store full card data on our servers.
Privacy.s4Li2: Supabase (authentication and database hosting your account and usage history).
Privacy.s4Li3: Audio and PDF storage provider (delivery of summary content).
Privacy.s4Li4: Transactional email service (welcomes, trial reminders, receipts, cancellation confirmations).
Privacy.s4Li5: Better Stack / Cloudflare (operational logs, security and abuse prevention).
Privacy.s4Note: We do not sell, rent or transfer your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes. International transfers to these providers are made under the safeguards provided by GDPR (Standard Contractual Clauses where applicable).
Privacy.s5Text: On summaryvox.com we only use strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service, such as authentication and session management. We do not use advertising cookies or non-essential analytics cookies that require consent. If we add advertising pixels (e.g., Meta Pixel) or analytics tools requiring consent in the future, we will display a cookie banner and update this text accordingly.
Privacy.s6Text: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction: TLS encryption in transit, password hashing, role-based access controls within our team, and audit logs. No Internet-based system is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security of information.
Privacy.s7Text: We retain personal data only as long as needed for each purpose. Specifically:
Privacy.s7Li1: Account data (email, password hash, name, preferences): while the account is active and up to 90 days after deletion, to enable recovery. After that period, it is permanently deleted.
Privacy.s7Li2: Payment data: Stripe manages and stores card data (we never store the full number or CVV). We only keep Stripe's customer_id and subscription_id while the subscription is active.
Privacy.s7Li3: Invoices and tax records: up to 7 years, as required by applicable tax and accounting laws.
Privacy.s7Li5: Support tickets: 2 years from the last interaction, to resolve disputes and improve the service.
Privacy.s8Li1: Access your personal data and obtain a copy.
Privacy.s8Li2: Request rectification of inaccurate or outdated data.
Privacy.s8Li3: Request erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten"), except where we have a legal obligation to retain it.
Privacy.s8Li4: Request portability of your data in a structured, commonly used format.
Privacy.s8Li5: Object to processing based on legitimate interest or restrict such processing.
Privacy.s8Li6: Withdraw your consent at any time when processing is based on it.
Privacy.s8Li7: Lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority.
Privacy.s8Note: To exercise any of these rights, write to info@summaryvox.com. We will respond within a maximum of 30 days.
Privacy.s9Text: We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. The current version will always be published on this page. We will notify you of material changes by email or through the service. Continued use of the service after updates implies your acknowledgment of the revised policy where the law allows.
Privacy.s10Text: For any question about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, write to info@summaryvox.com.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.s1Text: By accessing SummaryVox or using the service (the "Service" or "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must refrain from using the Service.
Terms.s2Text: SummaryVox is a platform that curates, produces and distributes summaries of non-fiction books in audio and PDF formats, offering:
Terms.s2Li1: Summaries crafted by our editorial team from essential works (business, finance, personal development, essay, etc.).
Terms.s2Li2: High-quality audio playback and PDF downloads.
Terms.s2Li3: Curated library focused on impactful works, with new titles every week.
Terms.s2Li4: Offline downloads for the entire catalog with the Premium subscription.
Terms.s3Text: To use the service you must:
Terms.s3Li1: Be at least 18 years old or have parental consent.
Terms.s3Li2: Provide truthful, accurate and up-to-date information.
Terms.s3Li3: Maintain the confidentiality and security of your password.
Terms.s3Li4: Promptly notify us of any unauthorized use of your account by writing to info@summaryvox.com.
Terms.s3_1Text: All information provided during registration must be truthful and accurate. You warrant the authenticity of the data you provide and undertake to keep it updated. You will be solely responsible for false or inaccurate statements.
Terms.s3_2Text: Your account is personal and non-transferable. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password, for any activity that occurs under your account, and for promptly notifying info@summaryvox.com of any unauthorized use, as well as for damage caused by misuse of your account by third parties.
Terms.s4_1Li1: Limited access to the catalog (reduced number of summaries).
Terms.s4_1Li2: No cost, no credit card required.
Terms.s4_2Li2: Full catalog access and new titles every week.
Terms.s4_2Li4: Playback speed control and ad-free experience.
Terms.s4_2Li5: From $29.99 USD/month. Reduced regional prices apply in selected markets (e.g., €19.99/month in Spain). The exact amount is always displayed at checkout in your local currency before you confirm the payment.
Terms.s5Li1: Payments are processed securely through Stripe, a PCI-DSS certified processor.
Terms.s5Li2: The Premium subscription renews automatically each month by debit to the registered payment method.
Terms.s5Li3: Payments are processed in your local currency where available (USD, EUR, etc.).
Terms.s5Li4: Applicable taxes are added based on your location, in accordance with local regulations.
Terms.s5Li5: Prices may change with at least 30 days' prior notice by email or through the service. If you reject the new price, you may cancel before it takes effect.
Terms.s6Text: When you sign up for the Premium Plan the following regime applies:
Terms.s6Li1: 24-hour free trial: the first 24 hours are completely free. During the trial you have full access to all Premium features and no charge, hold or debit is made.
Terms.s6Li2: Cancellation during the trial: you may cancel at any time within the first 24 hours to avoid the first charge, with no penalty or exit cost.
Terms.s6Li3: Automatic renewal: after 24 hours without cancellation, the monthly subscription begins and renews automatically each calendar month.
Terms.s6Li4: Effects of cancellation: cancellation immediately stops all future charges and you keep Premium access until the end of the period already paid. No penalties or extra charges apply.
Terms.s6Li5: 14-day refund window: within 14 days of the first paid charge, you may request a prorated refund based on unused time by writing to info@summaryvox.com. After that period, cancellation stops future charges but does not generate a refund of the period already paid.
Terms.s7Text: Cancelling is at least as easy as subscribing: same channel (web), equal or fewer clicks, no phone calls, no additional steps, no retention questions, and no charges. This clause applies on equal terms to all users, regardless of country of residence.
Terms.s8Text: You can cancel in any of these three ways, all self-service and without contacting support:
Terms.s8Li1: Option A — With your account (recommended): log in, go to the Account page, click "Cancel Subscription" and confirm. Two clicks total.
Terms.s8Li2: Option B — Without logging in: visit /cancel, enter your subscription email and confirm. Useful if you forgot your password.
Terms.s8Li3: Option C — 1-click link in any email: every transactional email we send (welcome, trial reminder, payment receipt) includes a 1-click cancellation link in the footer. No login required.
Terms.s8Note: You will receive a cancellation confirmation email. You keep Premium access until the end of the period already paid.
Terms.s9Text: All content available on SummaryVox — including audio, text, graphics, logos, designs and software — is the property of SummaryVox or its licensors and is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. Users receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the content solely for personal, non-commercial purposes.
Terms.s9Note: Summaries published on SummaryVox are original works created for educational and informational purposes. They are not audiobooks, recordings, transcriptions, or derivative works of the original copyrighted books, and they do not replace reading the original works.
Terms.s10Li1: Sharing your account with third parties.
Terms.s10Li2: Downloading or redistributing the content without express authorization.
Terms.s10Li3: Using the service for commercial purposes without prior written authorization, including copying, redistributing, transcribing, retransmitting or monetizing the content, in whole or in part.
Terms.s10Li4: Attempting to circumvent security measures or technical protections.
Terms.s10Li6: Using bots, scraping or any form of automation to access the service.
Terms.s11Li1: The content is for educational and informational purposes only.
Terms.s11Li2: It does not constitute professional, financial, legal, medical or investment advice.
Terms.s11Li3: Any decision you make based on our content is at your own risk.
Terms.s11Li4: For important decisions, consult qualified professionals in the relevant field.
Terms.s12Text: We process your personal data in accordance with our Privacy Policy, which describes what data we collect, how we use it, the legal bases under GDPR, retention periods, and your rights. By using SummaryVox you confirm that you have read and accepted that policy.
Terms.s13Text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time, with or without notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension or discontinuation of the service.
Terms.s14Text: The service is provided "as is" and "as available". SummaryVox does not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free or completely secure. In no event will we be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data or use.
Terms.s15Text: From time to time we may offer promotions, discounts or extended trial periods. These offers are subject to specific terms communicated at the time of the offer. Promotions are not stackable unless otherwise stated and may be subject to eligibility restrictions.
Terms.s16Text: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, United States of America, without regard to its conflict of laws principles. The parties agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in the State of Delaware for any dispute arising from or related to these Terms, without prejudice to the mandatory consumer rights granted by the laws of your country of residence. SummaryVox LLC is a limited liability company incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware.
Terms.s17Text: For questions about these Terms & Conditions, exercise of rights, subscription management or dispute resolution, write to info@summaryvox.com. By continuing to use SummaryVox, you accept these Terms & Conditions in full.

SubPolicy.title: Subscription, Cancellation & Refunds Policy
SubPolicy.intro: This document is legally annexed to and integrated with the SummaryVox General Terms & Conditions and details the commercial terms, billing commitments, cancellation flow and refund policy for the Premium Plan.
SubPolicy.s1Text: We offer a 24-hour free trial to new Premium Plan subscribers:
SubPolicy.s1Li1: The first 24 hours are completely free.
SubPolicy.s1Li2: You have full access to all Premium features during the trial.
SubPolicy.s1Li3: No charge, hold or debit is made during the trial period.
SubPolicy.s1Li4: You may cancel at any time during the first 24 hours at no cost.
SubPolicy.s1Li5: After 24 hours, your monthly subscription starts automatically.
SubPolicy.s2_1Text: The Free Plan may be cancelled at any time at no cost. No prior notice or formal cancellation process is required.
SubPolicy.s2_2Li1: During the first 24 hours (free trial): cancel whenever you want to avoid the first charge. No debit is made.
SubPolicy.s2_2Li2: After the first charge: cancellation immediately stops all future charges.
SubPolicy.s2_2Li3: Remaining access: you keep Premium access until the end of the period already paid.
SubPolicy.s2_2Li4: No penalties: there are no penalties or additional charges for cancelling.
SubPolicy.s2_2Li5: No login required: you may cancel your subscription with or without logging in.
SubPolicy.s3Text: You can cancel in any of these three ways, all self-service, without contacting support:
SubPolicy.s3aText: Log in, go to the Account page, click "Cancel Subscription" and confirm. Two clicks total.
SubPolicy.s3bText: Visit /cancel, enter your subscription email and confirm. Useful if you forgot your password.
SubPolicy.s3cTitle: Option C — 1-click link in any email
SubPolicy.s3cText: Every transactional email we send (welcome, trial reminder, payment receipt, price change notice) includes a 1-click cancellation link in the footer. No login required.
SubPolicy.s3Note: Cancelling is at least as easy as subscribing: same channel (web), equal or fewer clicks, no phone calls, no retention questions, no charges.
SubPolicy.s4Li1: The Premium subscription renews automatically each month.
SubPolicy.s4Li2: You are automatically charged at the end of each billing period.
SubPolicy.s4Li3: The charge is made to the same registered payment method.
SubPolicy.s4Li4: You may cancel at any time before the renewal date.
SubPolicy.s4Li5: If your payment fails, access to Premium is suspended until the payment is resolved or the cancellation is confirmed.
SubPolicy.s5Text: Our refund policy is as follows:
SubPolicy.s5Li1: 24-hour trial: cancelling during the trial never produces a charge, so there's no refund to request.
SubPolicy.s5Li2: 14-day window after the first charge: within 14 days of the first paid charge, you may request a prorated refund based on unused time by writing to info@summaryvox.com.
SubPolicy.s5Li3: Outside the 14-day window: cancellation stops future charges but does not produce a refund of the period already paid. You retain access until the end of that period.
SubPolicy.s5Li4: Incorrect or duplicate charges: if you spot an incorrect or duplicate charge, write to info@summaryvox.com and we'll resolve it as soon as possible.
SubPolicy.s6Li1: We will notify you of any price changes with at least 30 days' advance notice by email or through the service.
SubPolicy.s6Li2: Price changes do not affect your current already-paid billing period.
SubPolicy.s6Li3: You may cancel before the new price takes effect at no cost.
SubPolicy.s6Li4: If you choose to continue, you accept the new price for future billing periods.
SubPolicy.s7Li1: If you don't recognize a charge or have a billing question, write to info@summaryvox.com before disputing with your bank.
SubPolicy.s7Li2: We can provide detailed information about each transaction (date, amount, method, Stripe identifier).
SubPolicy.s7Li3: We resolve billing issues quickly and fairly.
SubPolicy.s8Text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that:
SubPolicy.s8Li2: Engage in fraudulent activities, including abusive chargebacks.
SubPolicy.s8Li3: Share the account in an unauthorized manner.
SubPolicy.s8Li4: Attempt to circumvent security or content protection measures.
SubPolicy.s9Text: For any question about cancellations, billing or service issues, write to info@summaryvox.com. This policy may be updated periodically; changes take effect immediately upon publication on this page.

Hub.dashboardDesc: Here you can see and listen to all the summaries you have access to.
